    D

    deepCopy(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Stone
    Creates a deep copy of this stone, assigning a new owner reference.
    deepCopy(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Creates a deep copy of this node including its stone (if present), but without neighbor references.
    DEFAULT_FONT - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    difficulties - Package difficulties
     
    difficulty - Variable in Klasse persistance.PlayerData
     
    difficulty - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    DIFFICULTY_SCREEN_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    DifficultyLevel - Enum-Klasse in difficulties
    An enumeration representing different levels of difficulty.
    DifficultyLevel() - Konstruktor für Enum-Klasse difficulties.DifficultyLevel
     
    DifficultyScreenPanel - Klasse in view
    This class creates the Difficulty Screen JPanel for the game.
    DifficultyScreenPanel() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.DifficultyScreenPanel
     
    DifficultyStrategy - Klasse in difficulties
    The DifficultyStrategy class serves as an abstract representation of the decision-making logic for determining moves and removals in a game.
    DifficultyStrategy() - Konstruktor für Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
